name: Web store - Viewing the requested web store order delivery method
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Web store - Viewing the requested web store order delivery method"}], "data-id": "web-store-viewing-the-requested-web-store-order-delivery-method"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Fulfilment Report is the recommended way within Retail Express to view all of your incoming web store sales and process them ready for shipping."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Depending on the shipping methods you have enabled, you may wish to process some orders as a higher priority than others. e.g.: Express Shipping may have a higher priority than Free Shipping."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Delivery Driver function in Retail Express allows you to match information to the Shipping Method from your web store - thereby enabling filtering within the Fulfilment Report and processing of your sales more efficiently."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the Fulfilment Report, navigate to: "}, {"text": "Inventory > Fulfilment Report", "bold": true}, {"text": " OR "}, {"text": "Quick Links > Fulfilment Report", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When selecting your filters, ensure to include the required Delivery Driver/s (as mapped to the web store Shipping Method)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/115001129253/blobid2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/115001129253/blobid2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When viewing the results, the Delivery Driver information is available for each Order."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/115001134194/blobid1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/115001134194/blobid1.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To configure your Delivery Drivers in Retail Express, navigate to: "}, {"text": "Settings > Fulfilment Setup > Delivery Drivers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To configure the Titles of your Shipping Methods within your web store, navigate to: "}, {"text": "System > Configuration > Shipping Methods", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "the name of your Delivery Driver must match exactly the Title of your Shipping Method. Neither can contain 'illegal' characters, including hyphens."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Processing-online-sales-How-to-process-a-sale-from-my-web-store", "children": [{"text": "How to process a sale from my web store"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Delivery-Drivers", "children": [{"text": "Delivery Drivers"}]}]}]}]}]
